prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia writes a precise prompt on a small card, then an AI agent sends search threads to many small web pages and returns a condensed answer. Avilia marks useful parts and discards uncertain ones.

Core meaning: the key skill is asking good questions, letting AI work, then identifying what is useful.

Style: clean Chinese blog illustration, black/red/white, blue network threads, lots of white space. Minimal labels: "好问题", "让 AI 工作", "吸收".

Avoid dense prompt text, avoid claiming AI is always right, avoid corporate UI.
